name: grid
description: The open-source workspace where humans and AI agents collaborate

scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../grid-agent && npm install
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && echo '\n✅ Grid is ready! Run: npm run dev'

author: Ollie Labs
